listSelection.title: A dragon's power is not to be underestimated. If you like, I can add its power to one of your weapons. However, the weapon must be powerful enough to hold its potential...

dialogue.text: A stimulator is a special potion that I can add into the process of creating certain items. It gives it stats as though it had dropped from a monster. However, it is possible to have no change, and it is also possible for the item to be below average. There's also a 10% chance of not getting any item when using a stimulator, so please choose wisely.

choices.text: Dragon Battle Axe - Lv. 110 Two-Handed Axe

listSelection.title: Very well, then which Warrior weapon shall receive a dragon's power?

My fee is for the good of all of Leafre. If you cannot pay it, then begone.
